seoTitle: Forbesdale vs Fordwich — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forbesdale and Fordwich. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forbesdale and Fordwich.
heading: Forbesdale vs Fordwich — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forbesdale, New South Wales and Fordwich, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forbesdale has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Fordwich (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forbesdale or Fordwich safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forbesdale has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Fordwich scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forbesdale scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Fordwich scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forbesdale or Fordwich?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forbesdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
